name: Wavelog
compose:
name: slashnode-wavelog
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/wavelog/wavelog:3.0.0
    container_name: wavelog-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - wavelog-db
    environment:
      CI_ENV: docker
    volumes:
      - app_data-config:/var/www/html/application/config/docker
      - app_data-uploads:/var/www/html/uploads
      - app_data-userdata:/var/www/html/userdata
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8099:80
  wavelog-db:
    image: mariadb:11.4
    container_name: wavelog-wavelog-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MARIADB_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD: 'yes'
      MARIADB_DATABASE: wavelog
      MARIADB_USER: wavelog
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: wavelog
    volumes:
      - wavelog-db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  app_data-config:
    name: slashnode-wavelog_app_data-config
  app_data-uploads:
    name: slashnode-wavelog_app_data-uploads
  app_data-userdata:
    name: slashnode-wavelog_app_data-userdata
  wavelog-db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-wavelog_wavelog-db_data-db
